import json

cache = {}


def get_user_config(user_id: str) -> dict:
    raw = cache.get(f"config:{user_id}")
    if raw is None:
        raw = json.dumps(fetch_config(user_id))
        cache[f"config:{user_id}"] = raw
    return json.loads(raw)


def get_settings(app_id: str) -> dict:
    cached = cache.get(f"settings:{app_id}")
    if cached is None:
        cached = json.dumps(load_settings(app_id))
        cache[f"settings:{app_id}"] = cached
    return json.loads(cached)
